data.title: Indaptus Therapeutics signs clinical supply agreement with Beigene
data.description:
• Indaptus Therapeutics (NASDAQ:INDP) announced a clinical supply agreement with BeiGene (NASDAQ:BGNE) .
  • Indaptus plans to advance human clinical evaluation of the combination of BeiGene's anti-PD-1 antibody, tislelizumab, with Indaptus’ Decoy20, a novel treatment designed to induce a broad immune response to fight cancer.
  • Indaptus will seek approval from the FDA to initiate a combination trial, which is anticipated to begin in 2025.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Capital City Bank GAAP EPS of $0.78 beats by $0.01, revenue of $59.72M beats by $1.02M
data.description:
• Capital City Bank press release (NASDAQ:CCBG): Q3 GAAP EPS of $0.78 beats by $0.01.
  • Revenue of $59.72M (+6.6% Y/Y) beats by $1.02M.

data.title: ASML CEO says US plans to continue applying export pressure to China: report
data.description:
ASML Holding (NASDAQ:ASML) CEO Christophe Fouquet said the U.S. will continue to pursue restricting certain high-tech exports to China, and pressure allies to do the same, regardless of who wins the presidential election next month, according to a report by Reuters.

"If you look at the geopolitical landscape, I think it's clear that the United States will continue to apply pressure on their side for more restriction," Fouquet said.

Fouquet made the comments during a technology conference in London on Tuesday.

The Netherlands-based semiconductor equipment manufacturer still expects its sales to grow in 2025, although at a slower pace, and 2026.

ASML shares plunged on October 15 following its latest financial report, which revealed export sales to China would decline to 20% of total revenue in 2025 after accounting for 49% during Q2 2024. The projected decline is due in part to the Netherlands enacting stricter export controls for advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment in September.

Fouquet said the Netherlands and Europe are debating the future of further restrictions, according to Reuters.

ASML's largest single customer continues to be Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM). The U.S. Commerce Department is apparently investigating if TSM, which builds Nvidia's (NVDA) highly demanded AI chips, is also building smartphone or AI chips for China's Huawei.

ASML shares have steadily declined since mid-July, when they were closing at more than $1,000. They closed down another 1% on Monday to settle at $714.10.

data.title: Barksdale announces shares for debt transaction
data.description:
• Barksdale Resources (OTCQX:BRKCF) on Tuesday said it has entered into a debt settlement agreement to settle an aggregate of C$41,367 in bona fide debt owing to an arm's-length creditor of the company by issuing 258,543 common shares at a deemed price of C$0.16 per debt settlement share.
  • Barksdale said it intends to satisfy the indebtedness with the debt settlement shares in order to preserve its cash for development of its business.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Scorpius Holdings announces partnership with U.S. biotech company
data.description:
• Scorpius Holdings (NYSE:SCPX) has announced a strategic partnership with a U.S.-based biotech company.
  • Under this agreement, the biotech company will work with Scorpius' program management team, with plans to transfer a research cell bank to Scorpius’ state-of-the-art facilities in San Antonio, TX for future biomanufacturing activities.
  • With this partnership, the Co. continue to fulfill the critical need for secure, U.S.-based development and manufacturing support for groundbreaking biologics research.
  • “This partnership underscores Scorpius' ability to support biotech companies at every stage of their journey, from innovative research to clinical trials,” said Jeff Wolf, CEO of Scorpius.

data.title: SatixFy signs $9M software development and license agreement with MDA Space
data.description:
• SatixFy Communications (NYSE:SATX) on Tuesday said it has signed a software development and license agreement with MDA Space.
  • The full contract price is $9M, including $6M for delivery of the software solution with a license to support an existing MDA Space customer and $3M for a further license to support future customers.
  • In addition, the contract allows MDA Space to retain an option to be granted access to a part of the code, related specifically to the data plane, for a further $4M.
  • As per the agreement, SatixFy will provide the modem and beamforming software for chipsets to be used in digital satellite broadband Low Earth Orbit Constellation (LEO) payloads. In addition, it will also provide SatixFy’s software licenses and a development kit to support MDA Space deliveries to customers.
  • SATX +4.8% premarket to $0.65.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Blackwell 3D to cancel 25M shares of common stock
data.description:
• Blackwell 3D Construction (OTCPK:BDCC) announced, on Tuesday, a significant restructuring of its common stock. The company’s board has authorized the cancellation of 25M shares of common stock held by CEO, Mohammedsaif Zaveri.
  • In exchange for this cancellation, Zaveri shall receive 500,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock.
  • This strategic move is aimed at reinforcing the company’s capital structure, the company said.
  • The cancellation of 25M shares of common stock shall reduce the overall outstanding common share pool, thereby reducing shareholder dilution.
  • This cancellation is expected to be completed within 10 days, at which point the company’s total issued and outstanding shares will be reduced from 60,997,373 to 35,997,373.
  • Blackwell 3D (OTCPK:BDCC) shares were up more than 6.8% in pre-market trading on Tuesday.

data.title: Flag Ship Acquisition signs merger agreement with Great Rich Technologies, GRT Merger Star
data.description:
• Blank check firm Flag Ship Acquisition (NASDAQ:FSHP) on Monday has signed a merger agreement with Great Rich Technologies and GRT Merger Star ((Merger Sub)).
  • At the closing of the merger, Flag Ship shareholders will receive American depositary shares of GRT and Flag Ship will be merged into the Merger Sub, a wholly-owned subsidiary of GRT.
  • FSHP +0.50% premarket to $10.10.
  • Source: Press Release

data.title: Coya Therapeutics looks to raise $10M in private placement
data.description:
• Coya Therapeutics (NASDAQ:COYA) said it has looking to raise $10M through a private placement.
  • The firm said it will issue 1.38M shares at $7.25 apiece.
  • Shares in the company were up 0.7% in premarket trade.

data.title: AppLovin started with Buy rating at Loop Capital
data.description:
• AppLovin (NASDAQ:APP) was in focus on Tuesday as Loop Capital started coverage on the mobile software company with a Buy rating and $181 price target.
  • Shares rose 0.8% in premarket trading.
  • "AppLovin has become indispensable infrastructure for the mobile gaming industry and is proving itself as a big data and AI play for investors," analyst Rob Sanderson wrote in a note to clients. "For a sizable market cap with impressive growth, the stock was relatively undiscovered and, in our view, largely misunderstood until breaking out recently. Given the rapid stock price appreciation we would welcome [the] opportunity to buy on a pullback, but we think the revaluation is warranted, it will be sustainable, and we still see meaningful growth runway for the business within its core area of focus."
  • In addition, Sanderson said AppLovin has several parallels with The Trade Desk (TTD), but AppLovin's software business is bigger and growing with a "meaningfully higher" margin. And the expansion into ecommerce ads could boost the company's total addressable market, Sanderson said.
